hero.headline: Take control of your finances with confidence.
hero.subheadline: Track income, expenses, savings, debts and financial goals in one simple platform built for clarity.
hero.noCreditCard: No credit card required · Free plan forever · Cancel anytime

features.headline: Everything you need to manage your money

items.title: Income Tracking
items.description: Monitor every salary, freelance payment, and passive income stream in real time. Get a clear picture of what's coming in and where it's coming from.

items.title: Expense Management
items.description: Automatically categorize your spending. Spot subscriptions you forgot about, track daily habits, and understand exactly where your money goes each month.

items.title: Savings Goals
items.description: Define a target, set a deadline, and track progress toward each goal. Whether it's an emergency fund or a dream vacation — ARSPocket keeps you on course.

benefits.headline: Built around the way you actually think about money

items.title: Financial Clarity
items.description: Stop guessing where your money goes. Get a unified view of every transaction, account, and goal — all in one dashboard that updates in real time.

items.title: Goal Planning
items.description: Break big financial ambitions into achievable milestones. Set savings targets, track contributions, and celebrate every step forward.

items.title: Debt Management
items.description: See your full debt picture in one place. Track balances, interest rates, and payoff timelines so you can reduce liabilities faster.

items.a: Yes. ARSPocket uses end-to-end encryption for all sensitive data and follows bank-grade security standards. Your financial information is never shared with third parties without your explicit consent.
Absolutely. ARSPocket lets you add credit cards, personal loans, mortgages, and any other liabilities. You can monitor balances, interest rates, minimum payments, and projected payoff dates.
Yes. You can create as many savings goals as you need — emergency fund, vacation, home purchase, retirement, or anything custom. Set a target amount, a deadline, and track your progress in real time.

ARSPocket offers a free plan with core income and expense tracking, up to three savings goals, and a 6-month transaction history. Paid plans unlock unlimited history, advanced reporting, goal automation, and more.
Yes. You can export your transaction history and monthly summaries as CSV or PDF from the Reports section. Custom date ranges are available on the Pro and Business plans.

testimonials.headline: People who changed how they think about money

items.review: ARSPocket completely changed how I relate to my finances. I used to avoid checking my accounts — now I open the app every morning.
Tracking variable income used to be a nightmare. Now I can see exactly what's coming in from each client and plan accordingly.
The savings goals feature is genuinely incredible. I hit my emergency fund target three months earlier than planned.
Finally an app that handles both my personal and business expenses without getting complicated. Clean, fast, and reliable.
The dashboard is beautiful. I've shown it to colleagues and half of them signed up on the spot. Best financial app I've used.
Even as someone who works in finance professionally, I use ARSPocket daily for my personal accounts. The UX is unmatched.

socialProof.trustedBy: Trusted by teams at world-class companies

ctaFinal.headline: Start building better financial habits today.
ctaFinal.subheadline: Join thousands of users managing their money smarter. Free forever, no credit card required.

dashboardPreview.headline: Your whole financial life in one view

footer.tagline: Track income, expenses, savings and goals — all in one place.
